focusAreas: Replace std::unordered_map with Swiss tables (all queries)

Q1.notes: Query executed successfully. Returned 4 groups (A-F, N-F, N-O, R-F). All aggregations have positive values. Count_order sums to 59,142,609, which is reasonable for 59,986,052 lineitem rows with the date filter.

Q3.notes: Query executed successfully. Returned exactly 10 rows (respecting LIMIT 10). Revenue values are positive and ordered descending. However, some o_orderdate values appear as 1970-01-01, which may indicate a date parsing issue or missing data, but the query executed correctly.

Q6.notes: Query executed successfully. Returned a positive revenue value as expected.

focusAreas: Q3 zone maps + mmap optimization (I/O layer)
Q3 eliminate parallel scan data copies (CPU layer)

Q1.notes: Query executed successfully. Returned 4 groups (A-F, N-F, N-O, R-F). All aggregations have positive values. Count_order sums to 59,142,609, which is reasonable for 59,986,052 lineitem rows with the date filter. Results are semantically equivalent to iteration 1.

Q3.notes: Query executed successfully. Returned exactly 10 rows (respecting LIMIT 10). Revenue values are positive and ordered descending. Significant performance improvement over iteration 1 (1516ms → 352ms, 4.3x speedup). Some o_orderdate values appear as 1970-01-01, consistent with iteration 1.

Q6.notes: Query executed successfully. Returned the same revenue value as iteration 1 (1230113636.01). Performance improved from 22ms to 12ms (1.8x speedup).

focusAreas: Q3: Replace std::unordered_map with robin_hood for aggregation hash table
Q3: Eliminate OrderMatch/LineitemMatch materialization via operator fusion
Q3: Pre-compute zone map skip ranges to avoid redundant per-row checks

Q1.notes: 4 groups by (returnflag, linestatus). All numeric values non-negative. count_order sums to 59,142,609 which is reasonable for 59,986,052 total lineitem rows with date filter applied.

Q3.notes: Exactly 10 rows returned (LIMIT 10 respected). Revenue values all positive and ordered descending from 3,939,173.93 to 3,296,438.75. Dates in valid 1995 range.

Q6.notes: Single revenue value returned as expected, non-negative. Very fast execution at 10ms.
